change_families.summary: Foundation Mode and prerequisite ledger are prepared for local-first setup.

next_action: review changed files and run required verification; stage and commit only after explicit user request
rollback_note: Before commit, rollback is file-level by not staging or by editing the local diff. After commit, rollback requires a later revert commit or explicit user-approved history operation.
